title: CSS Flexbox Cheat Sheet
description: Quick reference for CSS Flexbox properties and usage.

commands.scenario: Use when you want to create a flex container for flexible layouts.

commands.description: Sets the direction of the flex items to be in a row.
commands.scenario: Use when you want flex items to be laid out in a horizontal row.

commands.description: Sets the direction of the flex items to be in a column.
commands.scenario: Use when you want flex items to be laid out in a vertical column.

commands.description: Aligns flex items to the center of the flex container.
commands.scenario: Use when you need to center items horizontally within a flex container.

commands.description: Aligns flex items along the cross axis to the center.
commands.scenario: Use when you need to center items vertically within a flex container.

commands.description: Allows flex items to wrap onto multiple lines.
commands.scenario: Use when you want flex items to wrap as needed.

commands.description: Distributes flex lines evenly with space between them.
commands.scenario: Use when you want to evenly distribute flex lines with space between them.

commands.description: Defines the order of a flex item relative to others.
commands.scenario: Use when you need to change the order of flex items.

commands.description: Allows a flex item to grow to fill available space.
commands.scenario: Use when you want a flex item to take up remaining space.

commands.description: Prevents a flex item from shrinking.
commands.scenario: Use when you want a flex item to maintain its size.

commands.description: Defines the default size of a flex item before space distribution.
commands.scenario: Use when you need to set the initial size of a flex item.

commands.description: Overrides the align-items value for a specific flex item.
commands.scenario: Use when you need to align a specific flex item differently from others.

commands.description: Sets the gutter space between flex items without needing margins on child elements.
A shorthand property combining flex-grow, flex-shrink, and flex-basis for cleaner code.
Distributes items so that there is equal space around each item (half-size space on edges).
Defines how multi-line flex containers distribute space between rows when there is extra space in the container.
Reverses the visual order of flex items along the main axis without changing the DOM order.
